name: arcana-deck-app
description: A static deck browser & reading composer for custom tarot decks (animated p5.js cards as React components). Bundles the Ultima Tarot deck.

notes.p5: Used in INSTANCE mode only (never the global build). The deck browser loads the npm package once; every card shares it. Do not add the p5 <script> CDN tag — that creates a global p5 and breaks instance isolation.
notes.react: Declared as a peer dependency so the host app controls the single React copy. Components are client-only (p5 touches window); render under a client boundary / dynamic import with ssr disabled if using a framework like Next.js.
